name: computer-use-win
description: Okno Computer Use for Windows: Windows desktop automation for AI agents over MCP/STDIO.

interface.shortDescription: Windows desktop automation from Codex through Okno
interface.longDescription: Okno: Computer Use for Windows is a Codex-native Windows desktop automation plugin backed by a local MCP server over STDIO. It provides the public operator surface `list_apps`, `get_app_state`, `click`, `press_key`, `set_value`, `type_text`, `scroll`, `perform_secondary_action`, and `drag` for state-first GUI work without exposing low-level Windows engine tools as the main product UX.
defaultPrompt: Use Computer Use for Windows to inspect the target Windows app.
Start with list_apps and get_app_state, then use click, press_key, set_value, type_text, scroll, perform_secondary_action, or drag only after fresh state proof.
